content.text:
Looking at the image, the track curves to the right ahead with the dashed center line visible bending right, and the car appears to be on track near center heading into the right bend.

**Waypoint Analysis:**
- nearest_waypoints[1] = 20, target = (20 + 5) % 121 = 25
- Target waypoint 25: (6.7749, 0.8413)
- Car: x=6.0190, y=0.6432, heading=0.7118°
- dy = 0.8413 - 0.6432 = 0.1981
- dx = 6.7749 - 6.0190 = 0.7559
- bearing = atan2(0.1981, 0.7559) = 14.69°
- delta = 14.69° - 0.7118° = 13.98°
- |delta| ≈ 14° → moderate left, use 10° steering at speed 1.5

```json
{
  "reasoning": "Track curves right ahead but target waypoint 25 is still to the left of current heading (delta=+14°), so maintain 10° positive steering to follow the waypoint line before the right bend sharpens.",
  "knowledge": [
    "Track starts with a long straight heading due east (~0° heading)",
    "Sharp right curve begins around waypoints 25-32 (x=6.8-7.3, y=0.8-1.7)",
    "After the right curve, track goes west around y=2.7-4.5 then loops back south",
    "Positive steering = left turn, negative = right turn",
    "On straights with |delta|<5°, use steering_angle=0 to avoid oscillation",
    "Track width is ~0.76m; car is slightly right of center (~0.039m)",
    "Speed 1.5 is safe on straights; reduce to 1.0 or 0.75 for sharp turns",
    "Need to prepare for right turn (negative steering) starting around WP27-30",
    "Car holding steady near 0° heading on straight — nearly on course",
    "Waypoint target index = nearest_waypoints[1]+5 consistently used"
  ],
  "movement_analysis": {
    "x": [5.779, 5.828, 5.900, 5.950, 6.019],
    "y": [0.6340, 0.6340, 0.6386, 0.6386, 0.6432],
    "yaw": [-1.100, -0.812, -0.500, -0.100, 0.712]
  },
  "waypoint_analysis": "Target WP25 at (6.775, 0.841): dy=0.198, dx=0.756, bearing=14.69°, delta=+13.98° → moderate left correction",
  "speed": 1.5,
  "steering_angle": 10.0
}
```
